MODULE: cosmos.integration.quantum.ibm_quantum
FILE: cosmos/integration/quantum/ibm_quantum.py (1725 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos IBM Quantum Integration
===================================

Quantum computing integration for enhanced AI capabilities using IBM Quantum Platform.

IBM Quantum Open Plan (Free Tier) - as of 2026:
- QPU Hardware: 10 minutes per 28-day rolling window (NOT calendar month)
- QPU Access: Heron r1

CLASSES:
- QuantumBackend(Enum): Available quantum backends (updated 2026).
- QuantumTaskType(Enum): Types of quantum tasks for resource allocation.
- ExecutionMode(Enum): IBM Quantum execution modes per official docs (2026).

Open Plan (free): Job and
- ResilienceLevel(Enum): Error mitigation levels for Estimator (per IBM docs).
- QuantumOptions: Configuration options for quantum execution (per IBM Quantum best practices).

B
- QuantumUsageStats: Track quantum resource usage against IBM Open Plan free tier.

IBM uses a 28-day

  Methods: def record_simulator_job(self)

  Methods: def reset_if_new_month(self)
